tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.deleteAppsAppId
tools.description: - This method is called on behalf of a developer.

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.deleteAppsAppIdVersionsVersion
tools.description: - This method is called on behalf of a developer.

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.getApps
tools.description:
- Results are paginated and the default is value is 1000 if no limit is provided
- If no query is specified, returns all APPROVED or SUSPENDED apps within the marketplace

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.getAppsAppId
tools.description: - A 'view' event is recorded when trackViews is set to true

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.getAppsAppIdVersionsVersion
tools.description: - Only returns AppVersions owned by this developer

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.getAppsBySafeNameSafeName
tools.description: - A 'view' event is recorded when trackViews is set to true

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.getAppsTextSearch
tools.description: - Results are returned for the market provided within the basic authentication credentials

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.getAppsVersions
tools.description:
- Results are paginated when limit is set, otherwise all results are returned
- If no query is specified, returns all AppVersions within the marketplace
- Only returns AppVersions owned by this developer

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.patchAppsAppIdVersionsVersion
tools.description:
- This method is called on behalf of a developer.
- Price and is required if the model is 'single' or 'recurring'
- Returns the newly updated app
- This endpoint updates only the fields provided in the request (relative update). In contrast, the POST version of this method replaces the entire object to match the request (absolute update).

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.postApps
tools.description:
- This method is called on behalf of a developer.
- Price is required if the model is 'single' or 'recurring'
- Returns the newly created app

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.postAppsAppIdLive
tools.description: - This method is called on behalf of a developer.

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.postAppsAppIdPublish
tools.description:
- This method is called on behalf of a developer. 
- Only effects the current working version of the app.

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.postAppsAppIdVersionsVersion
tools.description:
- This method is called on behalf of a developer.
- Price and is required if the model is 'single' or 'recurring'
- Returns the newly updated app
- This endpoint replaces the entire object to match the request (absolute update). In contrast, the PATCH version of this endpoint updates only the fields provided in the request (relative update).

tools.name: appsFindAndModifyApps.postAppsAppIdVersionsVersionStatus
tools.description: Only certain status changes are allowed. For instance, a developer is only able to suspend and unsuspend their app (which must already be approved). See here for a state change diagram of allowed status changes for administrators: https://support.openchannel.io/documentation/api/#415-apps-status-change

tools.name: customGatewayProcessPaymentsAndRefunds.postCustomGatewayPaymentOwnershipId
tools.description:
- Results are returned for the market provided within the basic authentication credentials 
- Payments must be enabled and 'Custom' must be selected as the gateway in order to use this API endpoint

tools.name: customGatewayProcessPaymentsAndRefunds.postCustomGatewayRefundOwnershipId
tools.description:
- Results are returned for the market provided within the basic authentication credentials
- Payments must be enabled and 'Custom' must be selected as the gateway in order to use this API endpoint

tools.name: filesUploadFiles.postFiles
tools.description:
- WARNING: File URLs or fileIds must be stored somewhere within the customData field for an app, review, developer or user. Unused files will be removed after a few days. 
- This method is called on behalf of a developer.

tools.description:
- WARNING: File URLs or fileIds must be stored somewhere within the customData field for an app, review, developer or user. Unused files will be removed after a few days.
- This method is called on behalf of a developer.
